description: Style NoteJust the pair for a weekend by the pool - this pair of sandals for men from franco leone are a closet essential. Hate your claustrophobic formal shoes after a long day at work? Switch to this pair as soon as you're home. These look good with shorts, PJs or casual pants - need more reasons to snag this pair?. Product DetailsWide brown strap covering the midfooot and forefoot with cut-outs and paddingSoft brown footbed with print at the heelUpper adhered to the tough outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel, has patterned lugs all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
